subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who, O my God, hast caused the spheres to revolve, brought the cycles into being, manifested the signs and unveiled the mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انت الذی یا الهی کورت الاکوار و انشئت الادوار و اظهرت الاثار و کشفت الاسرار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
